positive: A detailed, stylized mandala illustration of a mythical cosmic flora. The central subject is an intricate, bioluminescent forest creature, rendered in perfect silhouette against a deep, cosmic indigo background. The composition must be symmetrical and highly detailed, resembling stained glass and tattoo art. Use vibrant jewel tones (sapphire blue, emerald green, amethyst purple) contrasted with glowing gold leaf elements. The style should be hyper-detailed, neo-traditional ornamental, graphic art. Perfect clean edges, central focus, suitable for seamless apparel printing, volumetric lighting, high contrast, deep depth of field, rule of thirds composition.
negative: blurry, artifacts, text, watermark, signature, logo, extra limbs, bad anatomy, low resolution, grain, noise, cropped, messy, low detail, childish, photorealistic
